所有围绕着公主的东西都是黄金做的: 桌子, 椅子, 餐盘, 餐杯和家俱。
suǒyǒu wéirào zhe gōngzhǔ de dōngxi dōu shì huángjīn zuò de :   zhuōzi ,   yǐzi ,   cānpán ,   cānbēi hé jiājù。
All around the princess things that are made of gold: tables, chairs, dishes, cups and dining furniture.
制度: 欧洲的教育制度和中国不一样。
ōuzhōu de jiàoyù zhìdù hé zhōngguó bù yīyàng。
Europe's education system and China is not the same.
首先，我想宣布几条新制度。
shǒuxiān， wǒ xiǎng xuānbù jǐtiáo xīn zhìdù。
First of all, I would like to announce a few new system.
制造: 她叫我们不要制造噪音。
tā jiào wǒmen bùyào zhìzào zàoyīn。
She told us not to make noise.
请不要制造这么多噪音。
qǐng bùyào zhìzào zhème duō zàoyīn。
Please Do not make so much noise.
